cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So the question is about determining the possible time Andrew went to the coffee shop today. The coffee shop was closed after 8pm. Let me go through the information step by step. First, Andrew woke up at 8am. So he's up by then. Then, there are several people who saw him doing different things at different times. Let me list them out: - Elizabeth saw Andrew fixing their computer at the electronic store from 11am to 3pm. - Jennifer saw him buying a bike at the bike shop from 3pm to 4pm. - Anthony saw him buying cookies at a bakery from 4pm to 6pm. - Betty saw him watching a movie at the theater from 6pm to 8pm. So the coffee shop was closed after 8pm. So Andrew had to go to the coffee shop before 8pm. Now, the question is, between what times could he have gone? The options are A) 3pm to 4pm, B) 6pm to 8pm, C) 8am to 11am, D) 11am to 3pm. Let me think about Andrew's schedule. He woke up at 8am. Then, there's a gap between 8am and 11am. Unless he was doing something else, but no one saw him during that time. Then from 11am to 3pm, he was at the electronic store. Then from 3pm to 4pm at the bike shop. Then 4pm to 6pm at the bakery. Then 6pm to 8pm at the theater. So the coffee shop must have been visited when he wasn't accounted for by others. So the possible times when he wasn't seen are: - 8am to 11am (after waking up until Elizabeth saw him) - After his activities end at 8pm, but the coffee shop is closed after 8pm, so he couldn't go then.
